failures.description: The agent should have searched only available Electric Kettles, but it planned and executed a query including unavailable products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to find the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The agent understood the goal, but at index 1 it planned a ProductCatalogSearch with available_only=false, explicitly including unavailable products, even though the task required filtering to available products. The required information was already present in the user request. This is not an invalid tool call or unsupported intent; it is a deviation from the required tool-call plan/constraints.
